entity.label: Zabdi
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Called “the Shiphmite,” one of David’s officers, who had charge of his vineyards (1 Chr. 27:27).

nodes.label: Zabdi
nodes.description: Called “the Shiphmite,” one of David’s officers, who had charge of his vineyards (1 Chr. 27:27).

verses.text: And over the vineyards was Shimei the Ramathite: over the increase of the vineyards for the wine cellars was Zabdi the Shiphmite:
